scene.message: {nl}
Maki: ........{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: What do you mean?{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: ...It sure was.{nl} {wait_fr:88}How are you doing?{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Like that doctor?{nl} He seems like a good one.{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: ...{wait_fr:48}I don't like him.{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Did he do something!?{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: Oh... my bad...{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: Ah... I'm sorry...{nl} {wait_fr:94}Huh?{waitkey}{ret}
Maki: N-{wait_fr:60}NOOOOOO!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: What's wrong!Sonohara!{nl} Hey!{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: This is bad!{nl} Get a doctor!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: ...Yamaoka.{waitkey}{ret}
